title: Privacy Policy
intro: We take data protection seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal data in compliance with the GDPR.

sections.title: Data we collect
items: Account data (name, email address, profile details).
Contact form messages and related metadata.
Newsletter subscription data (email address).
Technical data such as connection logs and device information.

sections.title: Purposes
items: Create and manage user accounts.
Respond to requests and provide support.
Send newsletters with your consent.
Improve the service and ensure security.

sections.title: Legal bases
items: Contract performance for account-related services.
Consent for newsletters and optional communications.
Legitimate interest for security and service improvement.

sections.title: Retention
items: Data is kept for the duration of the contractual relationship.
Contact data is kept up to 3 years after the last interaction.

sections.title: Your rights
items: Access, rectification, erasure, and restriction of processing.
Objection and data portability.
Withdraw consent at any time, without retroactive effect.
You may also lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

sections.title: Cookies
items: We use strictly necessary cookies for site operation.
Optional cookies (analytics, preferences) are only set with your explicit consent.

sections.title: Automated feedback analysis
items: When you leave feedback on the platform, we may automatically analyze the content of your message to derive a satisfaction indicator (positive, negative, or neutral) and a confidence score.
This analysis is used solely to improve the quality of the service and training courses by helping us identify feedback that should be prioritized.
Your feedback text is not used to build a broader profile about you. No decision producing legal or similarly significant effects is made solely on the basis of this automated processing.
The results (class and confidence score) are stored with your feedback and deleted if your account is deleted.
Depending on the configuration, an automatic translation step may be used before the analysis; in that case, the text is transmitted only to enable this processing.
You can exercise your rights (access, export, deletion) through the features available in your personal account.

sections.title: Contact
items: For any request regarding your personal data, contact us at: contact@weebbackend.melissa-mangione.com
